name: inb4
description: Notify when tracked Twitch chats spike in message velocity.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://id.twitch.tv https://api.twitch.tv wss://eventsub.wss.twitch.tv; img-src 'self' https://static-cdn.jtvnw.net data:
